basic_details.job_title: IIFCL AGM & DGM Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 15 Assistant General Manager, Deputy General Manager Posts
basic_details.organization_name: India Infrastructure Finance Company Limited (IIFCL), Govt. of India Undertaking
basic_details.post_name: Assistant General Manager (Grade C) & Deputy General Manager (Grade D)
basic_details.job_location: Anywhere in India (including foreign postings as per requirement)
basic_details.short_information: India Infrastructure Finance Company Limited (IIFCL) has published the Assistant General Manager (AGM - Grade C) and Deputy General Manager (DGM - Grade D) Recruitment Notification 2026 on 08 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 09 posts of AGM (Grade C) and 06 posts of DGM (Grade D) on a regular basis across various disciplines. Eligible Indian citizens with the required professional qualifications and post-qualification experience can apply. Applications must be submitted offline by post. The last date for receipt of applications is 08 June 2026. Candidates can access the official no

qualification.details: Age Limit (as on 30.04.2026) | Educational Qualification & Experience (Summary) | For AGM (Grade C): | Minimum 12 years post-qualification experience (out of which minimum 7 years in relevant domain). Relevant professional qualifications (CA, CMA, MBA, BE/B.Tech, etc.) as per discipline. Last drawn position should be equivalent to Scale III or Grade B / E4-E5 level. | For DGM (Grade D): | Minimum 16 years post-qualification experience (out of which minimum 11 years in relevant domain). Relevant professional qualifications (CA, CMA, MBA, BE/B.Tech, etc.) as per discipline. Last drawn position should be equivalent to Scale IV or Grade C / E5-E6 level. | Detailed discipline-wise eligibility (Risk Management, IT, CISO, Forex, Finance & Accounts, Project Finance, etc.) is available in the official notifications.

vacancy_details.Discipline: Project Finance / Sustainable Finance / Credit Monitoring etc.

selection_process: Selection will be done through shortlisting of applications based on eligibility criteria followed by Personal Interview. Final selection will be based on performance in the Interview
subject to verification of documents and medical fitness.
how_to_apply: Candidates must fill the application form, sign it, and send it along with self-attested copies of all relevant documents by ordinary post / speed post only to the registered address of IIFCL. No other mode of application will be accepted.
Documents to be sent along with Application:
Caste / Category / PwBD / EWS certificate (if applicable)
Send Application to: The Deputy General Manager (HR), India Infrastructure Finance Company Limited, Registered Office Address (as mentioned in notification).
Important: Candidates should submit only one application. Multiple applications will be rejected.
important_instructions: Only Indian citizens are eligible to apply. Applications received after the last date will not be considered. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. All future communications will be sent through the official website only. Selected candidates will be on probation for 1 year (extendable up to 2 years). Service conditions include attractive pay, perks, and career growth opportunities. IIFCL reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process at any stage.

faq.question: Q1. What is IIFCL AGM & DGM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: IIFCL AGM & DGM Recruitment 2026 is a direct recruitment drive by India Infrastructure Finance Company Limited to fill 9 Assistant General Manager (Grade C) and 6 Deputy General Manager (Grade D) posts on a regular basis across domains like Risk Management, IT, CISO, Hedging/Forex, Finance & Accounts, and Project/Sustainable Finance.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced under IIFCL AGM & DGM Notification 2026?
faq.answer: The notification dated 08 May 2026 announces a total of 15 vacancies, including 9 posts of Assistant General Manager (Grade C) in various specialist areas and 6 posts of Deputy General Manager (Grade D), with horizontal reservation for PwBD candidates as per Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q3. What are the application dates and mode for IIFCL AGM & DGM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications for IIFCL AGM & DGM Recruitment 2026 must be submitted only in offline mode by post, and the last date for receipt of duly filled application forms at the IIFCL office is 08 June 2026, with 30 April 2026 taken as the cut‑off date for age, qualification and experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for IIFCL AGM (Grade C) and DGM (Grade D) posts?
faq.answer: For AGM (Grade C), the upper age limit is generally 45 years for General/EWS, 48 years for OBC (NCL) and 50 years for SC/ST candidates, while for DGM (Grade D) it is 50 years for General/EWS, 53 years for OBC (NCL) and 55 years for SC/ST, with higher relaxations for PwBD categories and ex‑servicemen as per Government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What educational qualification and experience are required for IIFCL AGM posts?
faq.answer: AGM (Grade C) applicants need a relevant professional qualification such as CA, CMA, MBA, or BE/B.Tech (discipline‑wise as specified) along with at least 12 years of post‑qualification experience, out of which a minimum of 7 years must be in the relevant functional area like risk, IT, CISO, or forex/treasury, and their last position should be equivalent to Scale III or Grade B/E4‑E5 in banks/financial institutions.

faq.question: Q6. What educational qualification and experience are required for IIFCL DGM posts?
faq.answer: DGM (Grade D) candidates must possess appropriate professional qualifications (CA, CMA, MBA, BE/B.Tech, etc.) with a minimum of 16 years of post‑qualification experience, including at least 11 years in the relevant domain such as CFO/Finance & Accounts, CRO/Risk, or Project/Sustainable Finance/Credit Monitoring, and should have held a position equivalent to Scale IV or Grade C/E5‑E6.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for IIFCL AGM & DGM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The offline recruitment advertisements for AGM (Grade C) and DGM (Grade D) specify that there is no application fee for these posts, so candidates only need to bear their postal/courier charges when sending the application.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for IIFCL AGM and DGM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process comprises shortlisting of eligible candidates based on their qualifications and relevant experience, followed by a personal interview; final selection and merit list will be prepared on the basis of performance in the interview, subject to satisfactory document verification and medical fitness.
